channel.title: data gathering on Christos Tsanikidis - CS, Math, Life
channel.description: Recent content in data gathering on Christos Tsanikidis - CS, Math, Life

item.title: Athens mini-markets Voronoi
item.description: The process followed was the following: Download data containing the addresses of 1404 mini markets in athens. Use google API to query the latitude and longitude of the addresses, given the information of the location (area and address). Convert latitude and longitude to cartesian coordinates, assuming linearity with small error due to the restricted range. Use google maps api to keep a white simplified map of Athens.

item.title: Turkey to Greece missile range
item.description: It was announced in Greek media that Turkey achieved a new maximum range with modern missiles in its disposal. Immediately the question that I was curious about was, what targets in Greece can be hit by Turkey now? Before I begin, I want to make clear that this experiment was created for fun and that I am not that pessimistic about the relations of the two countries. Problem Hit Area if \(\mathcal{T}\) the set of points that are in Turkey.
